chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1423 of 2016 C.P No.S- 1424 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.11.2016. Mr. Wishan Das Kolhi, Advocate for the petitioners alongwith petitioners in both the petitions. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel alongwith SIP Azizullah Seenhro SHO P.S Samaro. -.-.-. Today, Mr. Kamarullah Memon, Advocate, files vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents No.8 and states that they have never caused any harassment or extended threats to the petitioners, however, being parents of the two lady petitioners they would like to have cordial relations with their daughters in future. In this regard, Counsel representing the parties may play some positive role but the same plea at this stage cannot be entertained while exercising constitutional jurisdiction. Today, both Mst. Hajiran and Mst. Gul Bahar are present in person alongwith petitioners No.2 in both the petitions. On last date of hearing owing to the peculiar nature of the controversy both the ladies were sent to Darul Aman The Counsel for the petitioners has also placed on record a ‘Fatwa’ from the Madrasa Arbia Mujadadia. Be that as it may, in view of the judgment of Honourable Supreme Court reported as 2013 SCMR 1484, the lady petitioners are set at liberty and respondents are restrained from causing any harassment to the petitioners. With regard to plea of reunion of families, it is expected that both the learned Counsel would play a positive role in this Regard. Police official present today is also directed to provide protection to the petitioner, if they are approached with such a request.

With regard to plea of reunion of families, it is expected that both the learned Counsel would play a positive role in this Regard. Police official present today is also directed to provide protection to the petitioner, if they are approached with such a request. With these observations and directions, instant petition stands disposed of. Copy of this order be provided to learned State Counsel for compliance. JUDGE
